rationale: Both reviews surface identical scope violations in the diff (bundling of AffineAlgGroup violating the 'don't bundle' rule; naive IsUnipotent definition; premature ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup stubs with : True fields before Layers 0-5), and both prescribe the same corrective action (remove the file entirely until prerequisites exist). Acting on either produces the same better outcome of a blocked/rewritten PR; no material differences exist.
